diagrams.title: Variance as Spread Around Mean
diagrams.description: Shows how variance represents the average squared distance from the mean
diagrams.purpose: Visualize variance as measure of spread

diagrams.title: Law of Total Variance Decomposition
diagrams.description: Decomposition of total variance into within-group and between-group components
elements: Conditional distributions given Y=1, Y=2, Y=3
diagrams.purpose: Understand Law of Total Variance intuitively

diagrams.title: Binomial Distribution Shape
diagrams.description: Visual representation of binomial distribution for different p values
diagrams.purpose: Understand how p affects distribution shape

diagrams.title: Covariance Visualization
diagrams.description: Scatter plots showing positive, negative, and zero covariance
